daily.text: You need to think about the month, you need to plan the day, you need to take your elephant and divide into pieces and eat a slice a day.
daily.author: Sunday Adelaja

daily.text: By fundamentally changing how we design the places and systems that enable our daily lives, we can slash emissions way beyond the immediate carbon savings - because our own personal emissions are just the tip of a vast iceberg of energy and resources consumed far from our view.
daily.author: Alex Steffen

daily.text: Every day holds infinite opportunities. Explore!
daily.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

daily.text: Illusions can and do create PHYSICAL Dis-Ease within our bodies. So it’s most important to master our thoughts, to become cognizant of what we are spending our precious mental energy on each moment of every day.
daily.author: Alaric Hutchinson

daily.text: My hope fuels my determination to overcome any difficulty.
daily.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

daily.text: Heavenly Father, thank you for the blessing that you bestow upon me daily.
daily.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

daily.text: There is no worse place for an intelligence service like CIA to be than on Page 1, above the fold in your daily newspaper.
daily.author: Michael Hayden

daily.text: Whenever I am in a difficult situation where there seems to be no way out, I think about all the times I have been in such situations and say to myself, 'I did it before, so I can do it again.
daily.author: Idowu Koyenikan

daily.text: You should always take what I say about religion with a grain of salt, because the 7 deadly sins are more like my seven daily activities. I try to check them all off at least once a day. All of them except gluttony; my trainer keeps that under control.
daily.author: Milo Yiannopoulos

daily.text: Keep dreaming big. You have a great glorious future.
daily.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

daily.text: I found that dance, music, and literature is how I made sense of the world... It pushed me to think of things bigger than life's daily routines... To think beyond what is immediate or convenient.
daily.author: Mikhail Baryshnikov

daily.text: Many losses have gone sinking daily by our inability to recognize the great deal of power reserved in us. Watch out and make it real because soon, it's going to be your turn to shine!
daily.author: Israelmore Ayivor

daily.text: It used to upset me - now it makes me sad - to see people use patriotism and our troops as a pawn in their political argument. Because I know personally, growing up in a military family, the sacrifice that is made on a daily basis.
daily.author: Tamron Hall

daily.text: Failure is a sign post, directing the right road for life’s journey.
daily.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

daily.text: Life is full of change and uncertainty. We know this. We experience it on a daily basis.
daily.author: Carre Otis

daily.text: I guess we all like to be recognized not for one piece of fireworks, but for the ledger of our daily work.
daily.author: Neil Armstrong

daily.text: The Civil Rights Act of 1964 laid the foundation for the Voting Rights Act of 1965, but it also addressed nearly every other aspect of daily life in a would-be free democratic society.
daily.author: Aberjhani

daily.text: The most important part of the process of mourning is regularly reciting kaddish in a synagogue. Kaddish is a doxology, which Jewish tradition has mandated children to recite daily in a synagogue during the year of mourning for a deceased parent and then on the anniversary of his or her death thereafter.
daily.author: David Novak

daily.text: My daily diet consists of basically anything I think looks tasty, whether that's pizza, sushi, burgers, quesadillas. I like everything.
daily.author: Cameron Dallas

daily.text: Life is hope.Hope is faith.Faith is believe.Believe is possibilities.Possibility is miraculous.Miraculous is divine.Divine is supernatural.Supernatural is spiritual.
daily.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

daily.text: We all have our likes and our dislikes. But... When we're doing news - when we're doing the front-page news, not the back page, not the op-ed pages, but when we're doing the daily news, covering politics - it is our duty to be sure that we do not permit our prejudices to show. That is simply basic journalism.
daily.author: Walter Cronkite

daily.text: In the morning, I use a Philosophy cleanser and Olay Regenerist Daily 3 Point Treatment Cream, which sinks in well and feels firming. I rarely wear foundation, so cotton wool soaked in warm water is often enough to cleanse at night, but I take off eye make-up with Klorane's cornflower-infused remover.
daily.author: Saffron Aldridge

daily.text: I'm on JetBlue and United. So I spend a lot of time on airplanes with other people and in terminals or just traveling around and going to restaurants or whatever. The interaction I get on a daily basis is always positive. I've never had a negative interaction.
daily.author: Lance Armstrong

daily.text: Teaching does allow me to keep one foot in the youthful waters I tend to occupy in my novels, so I'm thankful for that. My students also remind me on a daily basis that the stories I collected during my district attorney days are actually interesting to people who haven't had that experience.
daily.author: Alafair Burke

daily.text: The best thing you can do for your kids is to show them God working in you on a daily basis.
daily.author: Craig Groeschel

daily.text: I am a virtuous woman.
daily.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

daily.text: Time flies. It’s up to you to be the navigator.
daily.author: Robert Orben

daily.text: Until you prove what is in you, what is in you shall always be what is in you.
daily.author: Ernest Agyemang Yeboah

wanderlust.text: The fear of rape puts many women in their place - indoors, intimidated, dependent yet again on material barriers and protectors... I was advised to stay indoors at night, to wear baggy clothes, to cover or cut my hair, to try to look like a man, to move someplace more expensive, to take taxis, to buy a car, to move in groups, to get a man to escort me—all modern versions of Greek walls and Assyrian veils, all asserting it was my responsibility to control my own and men's behavior rather than society's to ensure my freedom. I realized that many women had been so successfully socialized to know their place that they had chosen more conservative, gregarious lives without realizing why. The very desire to walk alone had been extinguished in them—but it had not in me.
wanderlust.author: Rebecca Solnit

wanderlust.text: It might be well enough to wander if you've a place and people to come back to, but I tell you now there's no desolation like wanting to go home and truly not knowing where it is.
wanderlust.author: Elizabeth Kerner

wanderlust.text: A wave of saudade swept over me as I realized home never existed at all. The concept of home felt far from my reach, and I felt sick with longing.
wanderlust.author: M.B. Dallocchio

wanderlust.text: What is a Wanderess? Bound by no boundaries, contained by no countries, tamed by no time, she is the force of nature’s course.
wanderlust.author: Roman Payne

wanderlust.text: She had a wild, wandering soul but when she loved, she loved with chaos and that made all the difference.
wanderlust.author: Ariana Dancu

wanderlust.text: I am a world of uncertainties disguised as a girl.
wanderlust.author: Nicole Lyons

wanderlust.text: Nostalgia in reverse, the longing for yet another strange land, grew especially strong in spring.
wanderlust.author: Vladimir Nabokov

wanderlust.text: It was the inverse of an island in the sea.
wanderlust.author: Elisabeth Eaves

wanderlust.text: You have to keep doing it, Even if no one is watching. The best artists, are those Who live from their expressions, Not chasing the impressions.
wanderlust.author: Nikki Rowe

wanderlust.text: I hope you know that you are not alone, and in those hours when you feel that you are, just know there are other people out there — singing the same melodies of wanderlust, climbing over mountains in the dark, and waking in the night to stare at the moon, thinking of this large world and dreaming — just like you.
wanderlust.author: Apex

wanderlust.text: The beauty he saw in her was the beauty she forgot to see in herself and what a beautiful reminder, that love is what will see us all through.
wanderlust.author: Nikki Rowe

wanderlust.text: Without struggle, success has no value.
wanderlust.author: Aaron Lauritsen

wanderlust.text: Summer is leaving silently. Much like a traveler approaching the end of an amazing journey.
wanderlust.author: Darnell Lamont Walker

wanderlust.text: I'm sorry! I really am! I wanted to get out of this place! I want to live! I want to get away from here and never see it again! I hate everything about it!'You will hate the next place, too,' I said. 'What you are you will carry with you.
wanderlust.author: Louis L'Amour

wanderlust.text: She's an old soul with young eyes, a vintage heart, and a beautiful mind.
wanderlust.author: Nicole Lyons

wanderlust.text: ..Luxury is the enemy of observation, a costly indulgence that induces such a good feeling that you notice nothing. Luxury spoils and infantilizes you and prevents you from knowing the world. That is its purpose, the reason why luxury cruises and great hotels are full of fatheads who, when they express an opinion, seem as though they are from another planet. It was also my experience that one of the worst aspects of travelling with wealthy people, apart from the fact that the rich never listen, is that they constantly groused about the high cost of living – indeed, the rich usually complained of being poor.
wanderlust.author: Paul Theroux

wanderlust.text: If we were meant to stay in one place, we would have roots instead of feet.
wanderlust.author: Rachel Wolchin

wanderlust.text: An ardent desire to go took possession of me once more. Not because I wanted to leave - I was quite all right on this Cretan coast, and felt happy and free there and I needed nothing - but because I have always been consumed with one desire; to touch and see as much as possible of the earth and the sea before I die.
wanderlust.author: Nikos Kazantzakis

wanderlust.text: In her fury she'd broken into Valencian, indicating the deepest possible roots in the land. I was impressed with how deeply she was from here, in a way I could never imagine being from anywhere, not even my home town.
wanderlust.author: Elisabeth Eaves

wanderlust.text: Explore, Experience, Then Push Beyond.
wanderlust.author: Aaron Lauritsen

wanderlust.text: Travel is life-changing. That's the promise made by a thousand websites and magazines, by philosophers and writers down the ages. Mark Twain said it was fatal to prejudice, and Thomas Jefferson said it made you wise. Anais Nin observed that 'we travel, some of us forever, to seek other states, other lives, other souls.' It's all true. Self-transformation is what I sought and what I found.
wanderlust.author: Elisabeth Eaves

wanderlust.text: It's time to change my life and see the world.
wanderlust.author: Jennifer Coletta

wanderlust.text: One soft humid early spring morning driving a winding road across Mount Tamalpais, the 2,500-foot mountain just north of the Golden Gate Bridge, a bend reveals a sudden vision of San Francisco in shades of blue, a city in a dream, and I was filled with a tremendous yearning to live in that place of blue hills and blue buildings, though I do live there, I had just left there after breakfast.
wanderlust.author: Rebecca Solnit

wanderlust.text: It is so gratifying to tell so many stories my eye can romance with, that I become the stories.They shall live on after me, and in that way it makes me immortal.
wanderlust.author: Deejay Kapil

motivational.text: A grandmother’s love is selfless all the way to the bones.
motivational.author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

motivational.text: Powerful and Positive thoughts create Pure and Transcendental emotions that can instantly connect two individual soul in different part of this world or universe through the medium of love.
motivational.author: Indy Bissessur

motivational.text: Stop waiting for the right person to come into your life. Be the right person to come to someone’s life.
motivational.author: Leo Babauta

motivational.text: The strength of the spirit sustains the soul.
motivational.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

motivational.text: With every step we take we have a choice to make. Our choices determine our actions. Our actions determine who we are.
motivational.author: Randall Marr

motivational.text: Success sits on a mountain of mistakes.
motivational.author: Bangambiki Habyarimana

motivational.text: Do you want to grow spiritually? Build better relationships? Succeed in your career? Conquer anxiety and find peace? Break a bad habit? Be healed from the emotional wounds of your past? Then meditate on, ponder, think about, practise mentally, and verbalise the Word of God. Instead of living off someone else’s spiritual insight, study God’s Word for yourself and allow the Holy Spirit to bless you with life-transforming insights. Jesus said, ‘The Spirit takes my message and tells it to you’ (John 16:15). And you’ll experience the truth of those words when you personalise the Scripture you’re reading.
motivational.author: Patience Johnson

motivational.text: Fear  desire  hope still push us on toward the future.
motivational.author: Michel de Montaigne

motivational.text: In all spheres of life, there are constraints. You have to develop your own strategy to overcome each constraint.
motivational.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

motivational.text: First gain the victory and then make the best use of it you can.
motivational.author: Horatio Nelson

motivational.text: Those who talk more about others' wrongs are actually Perilous, Be Careful.
motivational.author: Mohith Agadi

motivational.text: Future will always remember the heroes, its because of them there exist a future.
motivational.author: Amit Kalantri

motivational.text: Did not the souls also of the righteous ask question of these things in their chambers, saying, 'How long shall I hope on this fashion?' when cometh the fruit of the floor of our reward?
motivational.author: Compton Gage

motivational.text: The single greatest cause of happiness is gratitude.
motivational.author: Auliq-Ice

motivational.text: True strength resides in the heart, alongside beauty. So when in distress remember that you are courageously beautiful.
motivational.author: Tyconis D. Allison Ty

motivational.text: When a lion kills a deer it does not build negative KARMA, its meant that way!!!!
motivational.author: Harrish Sairaman

motivational.text: To become a better you, remember to be grateful to people who have contributed to making you who you are today.
motivational.author: Israelmore Ayivor

motivational.text: It is in vain to try and stop a star from rising, even with a ladder.
motivational.author: Matshona Dhliwayo

motivational.text: Your image is your brand and you have only one opportunity to make that first impression. Choose to make a positive first impression.
motivational.author: Cindy Ann Peterson

motivational.text: Stand strong. Stand firm. Stand tall like tower.
motivational.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

motivational.text: Nothing happens ‘to’ you, everything happens ‘for’ you.
motivational.author: Linda Deir

motivational.text: Data has no ego and makes an excellent co-pilot.
motivational.author: Jay Samit

motivational.text: Take all of your wasted honorEvery little past frustrationTake all of your so-called problems,Better put 'em in quotations.
motivational.author: John Mayer

love.text: ...You do yourself no favour if you let your sense of doubt-mistrust-scepticism to rise up within you to the point where you must look every gift horse in the mouth...
love.author: Isabella koldras

love.text: Man's delight in the Lord is the absolute peak of human triumph. He praises God when full of joy, and when not, he praises God to become full of joy. For to know and to live as though God is worthy of all praise, in all one's circumstances, whether seemingly good or seemingly bad, is the primary definition of joy and the richest triumph for man under God.
love.author: Criss Jami

love.text: Love is selfish yet a selfless feeling.
love.author: Heenashree Khandelwal

love.text: Why fight to the death when we can love eachother to death?
love.author: Sigurd Bache Hungnes

love.text: It is well to believe that there needs but a little more thought, a little more courage, more love, more devotion to life, a little more eagerness, one day to fling open wide the portals of joy and of truth.
love.author: Maurice Maeterlinck

love.text: Love them that hate you, but you can't love them whom you hate.
love.author: Leo Tolstoy

love.text: They’re scared of the other kind of love. The one which lacks hurt, but pains after awhile.
love.author: Dominic Riccitello

love.text: One of the most breathtaking concepts in all of Scripture is the revelation that God knows each of us personally and that we are in His mind both day and night. There is simply no way to comprehend the full implications of His love by the King of kings and Lord of lords. He is all-powerful and all-knowing, majestic and holy, from everlasting to everlasting. Why would He care about us—about our needs, our welfare, our fears? We have been discussing situations in which God doesn’t make sense. His concern for us mere mortals is the most inexplicable of all.
love.author: James C. Dobson

love.text: He had become enveloped in the Indian Summer of the Soul.
love.author: O. Henry

love.text: We have to consciously study how to be tender with each other until it becomes a habit because what was native has been stolen from us, the love of Black women for each other.
love.author: Audre Lorde

love.text: My eyes fall on you like a singing veil from the days of rebirth.
love.author: Kristian Goldmund Aumann

love.text: I laughed as we turned in a tight circle... 'Tonight you're all mine.'Jake smiled but looked me dead in the eye. 'No. From now on.'My heart skipped. 'What?'Yours,' he said simply, 'from now on.
love.author: Kieran Scott

love.text: Your mind is the most powerful magnet. What you think, you attract.
love.author: Debasish Mridha

love.text: Your silence is loudest to those who love you most.
love.author: Steve Maraboli

love.text: They did not use the sonic stunners but the foray gun, the ancient weapon that fires a set of metal fragments in a burst. They shot to kill him. He was dying when I got to him, sprawled and twisted away from his skis that stuck up out of the snow, his chest half shot away. I took his head in my arms and spoke to him, but he never answered me; only in a way he answered my love for him, crying out through the silent wreck and tumult of his mind as consciousness lapsed, in the unspoken tongue, once, clearly, 'Arek!' Then no more. I held him, crouching there in the snow, while he died. They let me do that. Then they made me get up, and took me off one way and him another, I going to prison and he into the dark.
love.author: Ursula K. Le Guin

love.text: We want to be women who advance. The kingdom of God is advancing, and the gates of hell will not prevail against it. Don't you want to advance along with it? Don't you want to help it to advance? And don't you want to advance into the deeper realms of the heart of God? Advance into more healing, more deliverance, more intimacy, more life? Fear makes us retreat. Love causes it to advance.
love.author: Stasi Eldredge

love.text: Today, take a pledge to love yourself. Do not cut, drown, get caught in the fire, or hang yourself. Reasons behind committing suicide can be cured!
love.author: Nikita Dudani

love.text: As long as there arehuman beings aboutthere is never going to beany peacefor any individualupon this earth (oranywhere elsethey mightescape to).All you can dois maybe grabten lucky minuteshereor maybe an hourthere.Somethingis working toward youright now, andI mean youand nobody butyou.
love.author: Charles Bukowski

love.text: Believe this,' he whispered, and kissed her with the sharp, sleek kiss, the silver kiss, so swift and true, and razor sharp, and her warmth was flowing into him.
love.author: Annette Curtis Klause

love.text: Trust doesn't need any proof, its always hypothetical.
love.author: Chandan Sharma

love.text: And then there will be the times when I see you laughing. Like the time you’ll be playing with the neighbor’s puppy, poking your hands through the chain-link fence separating our back yards, and you’ll be laughing so hard you’ll start hiccupping. The puppy will run inside the neighbor’s house, and your laughter will gradually subside, letting you catch your breath. Then the puppy will come back to the fence to lick your fingers again, and you’ll shriek and start laughing again. It will be the most wonderful sound I could ever imagine, a sound that makes me feel like a fountain, or a wellspring.
love.author: Ted Chiang

love.text: Cassia.I know which life is my real one now, no matter what happens. It’s the one with you. For some reason, knowing that even one person knows my story makes things different. Maybe it’s like the poem says. Maybe this is my way of not going gentle.I love you. (Ky Markham).
love.author: Ally Condie

love.text: It hasn't been just a weekend for me, Wilson. I've wanted you for so long. I fought off the thoughts every day, exhausting every option to keep you off my mind; I can't do it anymore. I want you right here.
love.author: Gretchen de la O

love.text: Mindfulness & Meditation help focus on the moment while at the same time knowing we cannot capture that moment, we are in a flow of moments we let flow. We can watch moments in detail without being attached to them. Non-attachment to past & future stems from this practice. Worry about past or future is wasted energy, however we can observe the past & learn from it without agonising over it & trust ourselves to handle the future better. We can celebrate the opportunity to grow as we gain understanding from observation & experience. We can watch ourselves & avoid being caught up in over-reactions. 'I am loved, right now, in this moment, I love, and am part of love itself. I am aware of myself at every level - the mental slowing gracefully to sense the spiritual within & all around, and the physical being still, or moving. I tune in to the flow of life in my body & the flow of life everywhere. I circulate love with each breath - from without to within & from within to all around.
love.author: Jay Woodman

love.text: I turn my head so that he doesn't see my smile and secretly curse him for making me feel special.
love.author: Kasie West

love.text: A great giftwe can giveto ourselvesis a willingnessto love everyone,no matter what.This frees us completely from the toxicjustificationswe use to hate.
love.author: Scott Stabile

love.text: God needs are in the needs of people.
love.author: Sunday Adelaja

love.text: Oh, poor baby,” she said, mimicking his drawl.“Whew. You’re back. There was this other Susie here a minute ago, and she was really nice to me. She scared the shit out of me.”She laughed. “They locked her back up in the loony bin.”“Good, because there’s only one Susie for me—the one who calls me on my crap and doesn’t let me get away with jack shit. That’s the Susie I need. That’s the Susie I’ve missed coming home to over the last year.” He kissed her. “And that’s the Susie who’s going to leave a gaping hole in my heart and my life if she doesn’t give me another chance.
love.author: Marie Force

love.text: Underwater, we're drowning victims, struggling over and under each others' bodies. But above, we bob with the tide,undercurrents pulling us just far enough apart ,so that we're drifting parallel but not together.
love.author: Craig Thompson

love.text: She was learning something important: how to live within the sound of her own slow breathing, how to love the view when her eyes were shut.
love.author: Gwendoline Riley

happiness.text: Happy Mind, Happy Home.
happiness.author: Napa Kettle

happiness.text: If people aren't able to see your magnificence that's their loss, not yours.
happiness.author: Scott Stabile

happiness.text: And then there will be the times when I see you laughing. Like the time you’ll be playing with the neighbor’s puppy, poking your hands through the chain-link fence separating our back yards, and you’ll be laughing so hard you’ll start hiccupping. The puppy will run inside the neighbor’s house, and your laughter will gradually subside, letting you catch your breath. Then the puppy will come back to the fence to lick your fingers again, and you’ll shriek and start laughing again. It will be the most wonderful sound I could ever imagine, a sound that makes me feel like a fountain, or a wellspring.
happiness.author: Ted Chiang

happiness.text: If this world affords true happiness  it is to be found in a home where love and confidence increase with the years  where the necessities of life come without severe strain  where luxuries enter only after their cost has been carefully considered.
happiness.author: A. Edward Newton

happiness.text: Your mind is the most powerful magnet. What you think, you attract.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: I can’t control my feelings, but I’m learning to have a say in how much my feelings control me.
happiness.author: Scott Stabile

happiness.text: Joyful living is a healthy life.
happiness.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

happiness.text: I wanted to freeze this moment forever, the chimes, the slight splash of the water, the chink of the dogs’ leashes, laughter from the pool, the skritch of my mother’s dip-pen, the smell of the trees, the stillness. I wished I could shut it in a locket to wear around my neck. I wished a sleep would find us, at this absolute second, like sleep over the castle of sleeping beauty.
happiness.author: Janet Fitch

happiness.text: My writings are my letters to the universe, who loved me like a mother.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: Don't seek permission to be happy.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: We are born into this precious human existence to achieve the uni cation of opposites and become enlightened, or liberated, from the illusion of separation.
happiness.author: Dashama Konah Gordon

happiness.text: To promote peace, promote understanding. To promote understanding, promote love.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: Love is the strength of the heart.
happiness.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

happiness.text: The single greatest cause of happiness is gratitude.
happiness.author: Auliq-Ice

happiness.text: We have to be open to love to feel happiness and joy.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: Seals:The Five Cosmic Seals are five occult Level 333, 666, 999, 1330 and 003 operating 400,000 minuet mystical degrees.
happiness.author: Compton Gage

happiness.text: Happiness is the interval between periods of unhappiness.
happiness.author: Don Marquis

happiness.text: People who have wellbeing and feel fulfilled, need far less than people who feel unfulfilled, who always seem to need more.' By Rethinking Your Mindset you can create SWIFT sustainable success.
happiness.author: Tony Dovale

happiness.text: It is painful those feelings of pain,but accept it with love to see the gain.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: Happiness does not depend on outward circumstances, but on the state of the heart.
happiness.author: J.C. Ryle

happiness.text: To know the Lord is the gift of peaceful joyful life.
happiness.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

happiness.text: We cannot really love anybody with whom we never laugh.
happiness.author: Agnes Repplier

happiness.text: Love is the moonlight when the moon is your heart.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: When you drink alcohol you are just borrowing happiness from tomorrow.
happiness.author: Jessica Nigri

happiness.text: Talk happiness. The world is sad enough without your woe. No path is wholly rough.
happiness.author: Ella Wheeler Wilcox

happiness.text: Manifest kindness to embrace greatness.
happiness.author: Debasish Mridha

happiness.text: But what was there to say?Only that there were tears. Only that Quietness and Emptiness fitted together like stacked spoons. Only that there was a snuffling in the hollows at the base of a lovely throat. Only that a hard honey-colored shoulder had a semicircle of teethmarks on it. Only that they held each other close, long after it was over. Only that what they shared that night was not happiness, but hideous grief.Only that once again they broke the Love Laws. That lay down who should be loved. And how. And how much.
happiness.author: Arundhati Roy

happiness.text: In the success equation, subtraction comes before multiplication or addition. You must sow before you can reap a harvest.
happiness.author: Mensah Oteh

happiness.text: Christmas united us as holy beings. We experience love, joy and peace.
happiness.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: You have the power to realise your dream. If only you are willing and determined.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: The gift of fantasy has meant more to me than my talent for absorbing positive knowledge.
positive.author: Albert Einstein

positive.text: The science of psychology has been far more successful on the negative than on the positive side... It has revealed to us much about man's shortcomings, his illnesses, his sins, but little about his potentialities, his virtues, his achievable aspirations, or his psychological health.
positive.author: Abraham Maslow

positive.text: Learn from the sun; it is warm to everyone, and is therefore never in short supply of those who adore it.
positive.author: Matshona Dhliwayo

positive.text: The most beautiful period of time in our life are the ones which we understand that the problems are our own. And we should not blame other cause of our own problems, we need to realize that we are the one who control our own future, let's remember that maybe we will not have always a peaceful life and may not always be able to solve all of our problems that we face at once but we don't have to stop trying to find a solution way for it, we need to be positive and have courage and working hard to get what what we want cause I don't believe in excuses that most of us made but I believe in courage , being positive and hard working. Let's be positive and have courage.
positive.author: Arash Tabish

positive.text: We can only reach the highest height, if we encourage each other.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: Daring life, graceful living.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: Opportunities may surface clearly, but it takes a positive mind to see them. Positive people think and think possibilities even in difficulties and failing situations.
positive.author: Israelmore Ayivor

positive.text: When God gives you an idea, you must act immediately on it.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: Dwell on positive thoughts!
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: Don’t be a victim of circumstances. Choose victory by gracious endurance.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: Subject to the law(s) of nature, hate is born to die.
positive.author: T.F. Hodge

positive.text: We only need grace to endure every situation.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: Whatever you did today is enough. Whatever you felt today is valid. Whatever you thought today isn't to be judged. Repeat the above each day.
positive.author: Brittany Burgunder

positive.text: Not every problem can be solved. Some are okay simply to avoid. Go around the, go under them, whatever it takes to reach your higher goal. Sometimes you have to fail your way to success.
positive.author: Anna Mitchael

positive.text: My hope fuels my determination to overcome any difficulty.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: The greater part of our happiness or misery depends on our dispositions  and not our circumstances.
positive.author: Martha Washington

positive.text: I will sacrifice today for tomorrow.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

positive.text: I think 'Heroes of Cosplay' will show a lot of the positive things, like how much effort it takes to make a costume. These people on the show aren't taking shortcuts. As long as that effort gets through to the viewers, we will be inspirational. Then there will be people who watch the show that want to get in and hands-on make outfits.
positive.author: Yaya Han

positive.text: May we continue to encourage one another, so that we will increase in strength and in wisdom.
positive.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

strength.text: What! Would I be turned back from doing a thing that I had determined to do, and that I knew to be right, by the airs and interference of such a person, or any person I may say? No, I have no idea of being so easily persuaded. When I have made up my mind, I have made it.
strength.author: Jane Austen

strength.text: Strength is not defined by the load you bear, it’s defined by the amount you can bend before breaking.
strength.author: Blake Mays

strength.text: Endure despite the pain. The key is grace of strength.
strength.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

strength.text: Tell me, who have never be knocked down by life’s circumstances?
strength.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

strength.text: Human strength fails, but the divinity within strength en the soul.
strength.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

strength.text: The world is abounding with beauty. You are a demonstration of this.
strength.author: Tara Estacaan

strength.text: Most physical battles begin once mental ones have been lost, anyway. Conquer the mind, conquer the body.
strength.author: A.J. Darkholme

strength.text: It's not his bodythat changesright away.It's somethinginside. He sayshe wants tobe a littleweaker. I don'tunderstand.I say 'thinner?'and he says'no, I wantto be strongerin a differentway.' notbecause of me,but for me.
strength.author: David Levithan

strength.text: My friend Bailey is looking at me with tears in her eyes and a smile of pure joy. She sees me, the real me, not the broken little bird that my mother sees, or the Ambassador of Hope that my father sees, or the girl who was stupid enough to walk off with a stranger and ruin everyone's lives that my sister sees. Bailey sees me as I want to be: a normal, non-newsworthy, non-broken, non-victimized sixteen-year-old girl.
strength.author: Clara Kensie

strength.text: He knows not his own strength that hath not met adversity.
strength.author: Ben Jonson

strength.text: Audiences will admire your character’s strength but connect with them through their weakness.
strength.author: Don Roff

strength.text: The strength of the spirit sustains the soul.
strength.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

strength.text: We can only reach the highest height, if we encourage each other.
strength.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

strength.text: There's magic in stories, magic in hope, and magic in coming together. I have learnt from people's stories, been inspired by their hope, and been strengthened by their coming together.
strength.author: Sharad Vivek Sagar

strength.text: I don't think anyone could really know her, just as the peak of her struggle blooms, she again appearered to have held it all together when the whole world; would have thought, she'd fall Apart.
strength.author: Nikki Rowe

strength.text: My heart's made of goldMy soul is pure steelLoved ones shall riseEnemies will kneelI soothe with water, attack with fireFor I am the master of my own empire.
strength.author: Sarah Brownlee

strength.text: People with vision sees opportunity where there is problem. They see money not problem.
strength.author: Patience Johnson

strength.text: We think we are so strong but it is only when others try to prey on our weaknesses that we realize how frail we truly are.”-Skyla (from Twiceborn).
strength.author: JP Robinson

strength.text: Love, Mercy, and Grace, sisters all, attend your wounds of silence and hope.
strength.author: Aberjhani

strength.text: But we are strong, each in our purpose, and we are all more strong together.
strength.author: Bram Stoker

strength.text: Neither super strength, nor telepathy, nor flight, nor telekinesis, nor any aberrant ability will ever be as great as the innate ability that a woman has when she is able to control her own mind.
strength.author: Kenn Bivins

strength.text: Man's delight in the Lord is the absolute peak of human triumph. He praises God when full of joy, and when not, he praises God to become full of joy. For to know and to live as though God is worthy of all praise, in all one's circumstances, whether seemingly good or seemingly bad, is the primary definition of joy and the richest triumph for man under God.
strength.author: Criss Jami

strength.text: Etta saw the way Sophia took a deep breathe, set her shoulders back, and moved with practiced grace on her way out — and she understood something about the other girl, truly understood for the first time. Sophia wanted it, when she was only ever sent out.
strength.author: Alexandra Bracken

strength.text: Cassia.I know which life is my real one now, no matter what happens. It’s the one with you. For some reason, knowing that even one person knows my story makes things different. Maybe it’s like the poem says. Maybe this is my way of not going gentle.I love you. (Ky Markham).
strength.author: Ally Condie

strength.text: Being strong doesn't mean that you never break! Being strong means that even if you break into a million pieces, you still have the courage to pick those pieces up, put them back together, and keep going on.
strength.author: Manprit Kaur

strength.text: Christians sometimes make themselves into elephants afraid of mice. You have the Creator of the universe on your side; not to mention, you've been given eternal life. 'Whom or what shall you fear?' To be afraid of anything other than God himself is like an insult to God.
strength.author: Criss Jami

strength.text: Characteristics of strength and individuality requires confidence and self-assurance to choose what is right against all odds.
strength.author: Lorna Jackie Wilson

strength.text: In a fit of anger he had said to her, 'You'll always be miserable,' to which she thoughtfully replied, 'Is that so? It's impossible to be miserable when you've known tragedy and hardship. Both strengthen and refine a person to the point where they may have moments of grief and sadness, but misery is known only to those who have a sense of entitlement...You know, people like you.
strength.author: Donna Lynn Hope

strength.text: Luck is for those with nothing else. I wish you strength and courage.
strength.author: Annette Marie
